hooks.command: F=$(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).tool_input?.file_path||'')}catch{}})"); case "$F" in *.ts|*.tsx) if ! OUT=$(npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit 2>&1); then echo "TypeScript errors after editing $F:" >&2; echo "$OUT" >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac
